response.step_by_step_log: Analyzed the video content. Identified the song "CHRONIC" by Anya Melfissa, which features vocals from 00:00 to 01:12. Performed a web search for the lyrics of "CHRONIC" by Anya Melfissa, confirming it is an English-language original song. The rest of the video (01:12 - 01:48 and 01:48 - 03:22) contains no vocal singing, only dialogue and instrumental background music.
response.global_summary: Anya Melfissa performs her original song "CHRONIC" in a 3D birthday live, followed by a story dialogue segment and an ending card with instrumental background music.

scenes.description: Anya Melfissa performs her original song "CHRONIC" with on-screen lyrics.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah (Hey)
Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah
Walking round' in reality, I'm so done, done
Feel like I'm losing my gravity, my vision
Of you that I see clearly in my mind
I'm so you
My thoughts collide in my mind, I know I really should try
To think, to blink, to sink into you all night
Whisper, whisper, whisper
Merging right into you all night
Whisper, whisper, whisper
Me and my only...
Press and hold onto continue
It'll always be you
Tell me you won't go away
Imagining maybe one day
That we'll meet in between
Organic life and blue screens
I, I do need you
Mirror on the wall say
You'll take me so far
Chronic, chronic, chronic
Collide 'til we go atomic
Turn it, turn it, turn it
To a different space, different wave
Want it, want it, want it
Opposites go supersonic
Love it, love it, love it
Dive into the fate we made
Whisper, whisper, whisper
Come take me right away
Whisper, whisper, whisper
Merging right into you all night
Whisper, whisper, whisper
Me and my only...

Instrumental music plays over the ending card. No singing.
